infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MarketQuad accesses your photo library so you can select and upload images to your profile or listings. For example, you can choose a photo to use as your profile picture or add product images to a listing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: MarketQuad saves images to your photo library when you download photos from listings or your profile.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MarketQuad uses your camera so you can take and upload photos directly to your profile or listings.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MarketQuad uses your location to show you listings near your campus and help buyers and sellers meet up safely.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: MarketQuad sends you notifications when someone messages you, makes an offer, or your listing gets a new view.

plugins.photosPermission: MarketQuad accesses your photo library so you can select and upload images to your profile or listings. For example, you can choose a photo to use as your profile picture or add images to a listing.
plugins.cameraPermission: MarketQuad uses your camera so you can take and upload photos directly to your profile or listings.

plugins.locationPermission: Allow MarketQuad to use your location to show nearby listings and help arrange safe meetups.
